overall.description: A first-person perspective train ride through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning inside a metro car with passengers and holographic advertisements, transitioning through tunnels and elevated tracks past futuristic skyscrapers during golden hour sunset, and passing the Memorial Park station with views through metal grates to the street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro car interior with holographic advertising windows

agents.ego_description: sitting or standing inside the metro car, observing the passing holographic advertisements through the window

notable_agents.action: passenger sitting on bench looking down at their lap
passenger standing and holding overhead rail

entered.detail: large glowing holographic advertisements visible through the train window showing various brands and animations
green upholstered bench seats along the sides of the metro car
orange vertical poles for standing passengers to hold
digital display showing route information and time

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic metro car with green upholstered seats and orange support poles. Two passengers are visible - one sitting on the right looking down, another standing on the left. Through the large windows, holographic advertisements glow brightly as the train moves through the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track passing through futuristic downtown canyon

events.description: train enters dark tunnel with yellow linear lights along walls
train emerges from tunnel into open air elevated track with view of city skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: experiencing the transition from enclosed tunnel to open elevated track, observing the cityscape

entered.detail: concrete tunnel walls with vertical yellow LED light strips
tall futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage
metal rail structure with safety barriers passing between high-rise buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left showing the metro interior before the train enters a dark tunnel illuminated by yellow linear lights. Emerging from the tunnel, the scene opens to an elevated track winding between massive futuristic skyscrapers bathed in warm golden hour sunlight, with holographic billboards visible on building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: Memorial Park station structure with metal grate windows overlooking street level

events.description: train passes glowing orange neon 'MEMORIAL PARK' station sign

agents.ego_description: looking through metal grates at the street level below while passing through the Memorial Park station structure

entered.detail: large illuminated orange neon sign reading 'MEMORIAL PARK' mounted on station wall
horizontal metal bars covering the train windows creating a caged view effect
view down to street level showing roads, vehicles, and pedestrians from elevated perspective

segments.scene_description: The train passes through the Memorial Park station, identified by a bright orange neon sign. The view shifts to looking through metal grate windows down at the city street below, showing the urban landscape from an elevated perspective before transitioning back to the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro car interior continuing journey with passengers

agents.ego_description: standing inside the moving metro car holding a pole, observing other passengers and the passing city through windows

notable_agents.action: passenger standing and holding orange pole looking out the window
passenger sitting on bench with head down wearing dark jacket

entered.detail: closed sliding doors with glass panels showing passing scenery

segments.scene_description: The scene returns to the metro car interior, showing passengers including a standing figure holding an orange pole and a seated passenger. The train continues moving through the city with natural light streaming through the windows, passing other structures and maintaining a steady journey through the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the enclosed interior of a futuristic metro car out into a sprawling, sun-drenched urban landscape before returning to the cabin. It begins inside the car among green upholstered seats and orange poles, where holographic advertisements glow through the windows as the train moves. The camera pans left just as the train plunges into a dark tunnel illuminated by yellow linear lights, before emerging onto elevated tracks that wind between massive skyscrapers bathed in warm golden hour sunlight. The scene then shifts as the train passes through the Memorial Park station, glancing through metal grate windows down at the city streets below. Finally, the perspective returns to the interior of the car, where passengers stand and sit in the streaming natural light as the train continues its steady journey through the city.
